name: API Key Authentication
description: Implement API key authentication for developer-facing APIs. Keys are SHA-256 hashed before storage (never store raw keys), support scopes (read/write/admin), have per-key rate limits, and log every request for billing.

steps.description: Create generateApiKey() using crypto.randomBytes(32), hashKey() using SHA-256, prefix with "ag_"
Create api_keys table: id, keyHash, prefix (first 8 chars for lookup), scopes, userId, lastUsed, rateLimit
Create validateApiKey(req) middleware: extract Bearer token, hash, lookup by prefix, verify hash, check scopes
Create POST /api/keys (create key, return raw key ONCE), GET /api/keys (list keys with last-used), DELETE /api/keys/[id]
Create api_usage table for per-key request logging (for billing and analytics)
